purpose: evidence-only comparison; this harness cannot select or adopt a production backend

candidates.usearch: 2.26.0, HNSW F32, cosine, default features disabled

shared_workload.latency_scope: first_query_after_load_ms is measured after opening the candidate generation in its fresh candidate process; it is not a cold-cache claim because build and source-truth work may already have touched filesystem pages
shared_workload.selection: seeded nested real anchors; all catalog targets are force-included before the seeded fill
shared_workload.input_contract: one complete immutable CodeStory retrieval publication admitted through a pinned product query session; its vectors.sqlite3, vector-generation-manifest.json, core publication identity, live query-embedder identity, independently reviewable vector-free source-truth query catalog bound to the clean exact Git checkout it names, and frozen query vectors generated before candidate timing; the measurement binary must re-resolve every catalog document hash and reproduce every product query vector before admitting the fixture
shared_workload.execution_contract: the orchestrator snapshots source, generation manifest, reviewed catalog, fixture, and binary-produced fixture verification into one immutable fsynced evidence bundle; every child verifies that bundle, the exact binary digest, and macOS-arm64 host evidence before and after work; completed journals replay the full counterbalanced matrix and validate every artifact digest, input binding, and required publication/cancellation fault result before completion markers are written

selection_requires: both clean evidence roots pass every declared workload and paired block
the source-truth catalog receives independent review
the immutable-generation, pre-publication validation, rollback, corruption, incomplete-generation, attributable mid-build cancellation, and concurrent-reader rows all pass
offline, license, native-dependency, archive-size, and later adoption integration evidence are complete
the candidate has a reversible fallback to the embedded scan

non_goals: using synthetic vectors as decision evidence
using a cache, hook, or workflow change to manufacture proof
